expectations.evidence: sys.path.insert to ~/scripts, from notify import send_notification

expectations.text: Uses Pushover as the notification backend (not just macOS notifications)
expectations.evidence: Checks PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN, uses send_notification from notify.py which uses Pushover

expectations.text: Sends notification with the filename included in the message
Sets an appropriate priority level (0 or 1 for file monitoring)
expectations.evidence: priority=0 with comment 'Normal priority for file monitoring'

expectations.text: Reads PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN from environment
expectations.evidence: os.environ.get for both variables with warning if missing
